item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response begins by refusing the next local page patch, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding another template/form field, moves upstream to data definition, ownership, validation, and release rules, and proposes a unified data contract/submission gate instead. It does not provide a warranty field or implementation step for adding one."}
